description_long: This is a Moog Grandmother analog synthesizer keyboard, featuring a compact rectangular body with a slanted control panel above a set of piano-style keys. The control panel is divided into colored sections, each with various knobs, switches, and patch points for sound manipulation. The front face displays the Moog logo and model name, while the keys are white with black sharps, typical of a musical keyboard. The casing appears to be made of sturdy black plastic or metal, with a matte finish and visible screws along the edges. The top panel is adorned with colorful labels and control elements, giving it a distinctive, professional appearance. This keyboard is designed for tabletop use and is commonly found in music studios, performance venues, or urban creative spaces.
description: A Moog Grandmother analog synthesizer keyboard with a colorful control panel, white and black piano keys, and a sturdy black casing. It features multiple knobs, switches, and patch points for sound design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of piano keys, colorful control panel, and the main interface for playing and adjusting sounds.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slanted control panel and the depth of the keyboard's casing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Moog logo, model name, and various input/output ports for connectivity.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angled control panel and the side profile of the keys and casing.
attribute_key_layout: Piano-style synthesizer keybed (approx. 32 keys, no numpad)
